final_rulings.title: Race Condition: Non-Atomic Backup Index Write
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Requires threading.Lock() around _save_index() or file locking. Test by simulating concurrent backup operations.

final_rulings.title: Resource Leak: Unclosed subprocess Pipes on Timeout
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Before self.process.terminate(), close self.process.stdout and self.process.stderr. This unblocks reader threads.

final_rulings.title: Directory Traversal via Preset Import
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Implement path validation similar to action_catalog.py:78-83. Reject paths outside allowed directories.

final_rulings.title: Missing Error Handling for reg.exe
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Check for FileNotFoundError explicitly. Alert user if reg.exe unavailable.

final_rulings.title: Flight Recorder State Not Reset on Failure
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Use try/finally pattern to ensure current_snapshot is cleared. Consider context manager protocol.

final_rulings.title: Singleton Race Condition
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Add threading.Lock() around singleton initialization. Low priority as current usage pattern is safe.

final_rulings.title: CPU Score None Handling
final_rulings.reason: Benchmark database always returns valid int. No None case possible.

final_rulings.title: PowerShell Injection Risk
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Current sanitization is adequate. Consider parameterized PowerShell commands in v2.0 for defense-in-depth.

final_rulings.title: Snapshot Cleanup Not Atomic
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Use temp directory rename pattern. Low priority as impact is minimal disk space waste.

final_rulings.title: WMI Connection Not Closed
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Add explicit close() method. Low impact due to single instance and GC cleanup.

final_rulings.title: UI Thread Blocking on Detection
final_rulings.reason: Already properly handled by threading in app_minimal.py:102-107

final_rulings.title: Batch Validation Pattern Permissiveness
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Consider token-based parsing or regex in v2.0. Current implementation is adequate for threat model.

final_rulings.title: Config Load No Schema Validation
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Implement schema validation in load_config(). Reject unknown keys, validate types against defaults.

final_rulings.title: Profile Manager Concurrent Execution
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Add execution lock or 'busy' flag. UI should also disable controls during execution.

final_rulings.title: Missing Error Handling in int() Parse
final_rulings.fix_guidance: Wrap int() calls in try/except with fallback to 0. Log unexpected output for debugging.

recommendations: IMMEDIATE (P1): Fix BUG-001 (backup index race) and BUG-002 (subprocess leak) - these can cause data loss and resource exhaustion
HIGH PRIORITY (P2): Address BUG-005 (flight recorder state), BUG-013 (config validation), BUG-015 (int parsing), BUG-003 (path traversal)
MEDIUM PRIORITY (P3): Add concurrency guard for profile manager (BUG-014)
LOW PRIORITY (P4): All other bugs are defensive improvements with low production impact
REJECTED: BUG-007 and BUG-011 are not actual bugs - remove from tracker

strengths: Proper exception handling in most critical paths
Defensive programming in batch script validation
Well-structured separation of concerns (core vs GUI)
Threading used appropriately for system detection
weaknesses: State management could be more robust
Some error handlers too broad (catch Exception)
